Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class PendingOrderSummary

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.PendingOrderSummary
public class PendingOrderSummary extends SObject

Java class for PendingOrderSummary complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PendingOrderSummary">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillToContact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillToContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingEmailAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingPhoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalReferenceIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GrandTotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Payload" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PayloadType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesStore" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}WebStore" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesStoreId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShopperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
